visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman standing in a wide aisle of a warehouse-style retail store. She is wearing a white lace top and a zebra-patterned bucket hat, smiling broadly at the camera. In her arms, she holds three large, white, animal-shaped plush pillows: a rabbit, an otter, and a polar bear. The background is filled with high industrial shelving units stacked with numerous boxes of household goods, illuminated by bright, overhead warehouse lighting. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) The woman shifts the plushies, moving the otter pillow forward to show a small accessory it is holding in its paws. Her hands are visible as she adjusts the items, demonstrating their soft texture and size. The environment remains a busy retail space with boxes of 'DON' brand products visible on the shelves behind her. Yellow subtitles and price tags appear at the bottom and sides of the frame to highlight the product features. (3) The camera follows her as she walks toward a large cardboard display bin labeled 'ICE COOL BEDDING' and 'Ice Animal Cushion'. She reaches into the bin and pulls out a long, cylindrical white bolster pillow that has a minimalist face with squinting eyes embroidered on the end. She holds it up horizontally to demonstrate its length and shape. In the background, the vast warehouse interior continues, and the lighting remains bright and even across the scene.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 夏天到了. (2) [Subtitle]: 小朋友一定要一個可愛的. (3) [Subtitle]: 動物涼感抱枕 699元. [Slogan]: 超冰涼!. (4) [Subtitle]: 他有小兔子. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後這個是水獺 海獺. (6) [Subtitle]: 看這個很值得 是因為它有多一個手裏的東西. (7) [Subtitle]: 它比較特別. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後另外一個是 這個小熊熊. (9) [Subtitle]: 都很可愛 然後如果你是大人. (10) [Subtitle]: 加100 799. (11) [Subtitle]: 就有長形的. (12) [Subtitle]: 涼感枕. (13) [Subtitle]: 好可愛喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 distant, blurry person in the background near the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white floral lace blouse and a black-and-white zebra-patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving units, large cardboard display boxes for bedding products, and industrial-style ceiling beams with bright fluorescent lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a cheerful, high-energy female voice speaking Mandarin rapidly. An upbeat electronic pop background track with a prominent synth bassline and bright percussion starts immediately. A soft 'pop' sound effect coincides with the appearance of the text on screen. The acoustic environment is clean, with minimal warehouse echo. (2) As the speaker describes the animal pillows, a 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition between visual cuts. The speaker's pitch remains high and engaging, with enthusiastic intonation. The background music maintains a constant 4/4 beat, providing a rhythmic pulse that complements the fast speech rate. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect is heard when the price '699元' is highlighted. The ambient floor remains very low, barely audible behind the primary vocal and musical signal. The speaker's breath is occasionally audible between sentences, adding a natural, unscripted feel to the recording. (4) In the final phase, as the speaker shows the longer pillows, her vocal arousal remains high. The background music continues at a steady volume, and the recording concludes with a final energetic phrase from the speaker, followed by a quick fade-out of the music track. The overall mix is well-balanced with high signal-to-noise ratio.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> Variation Introduction -> Pricing Info
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and showcase the seasonal cooling animal pillows available at Costco, targeting parents and shoppers looking for summer household items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions Costco, shows the store environment, features product prices, and provides a shopping recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy retail discovery video utilizing social-media native editing styles like rapid text overlays and upbeat music to drive product interest.
